case_title: CHEMICAL BANK, A CORPORATION vs. GOODMAN, MICHAEL I. et al

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-07-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUL-07-1995, FOR FAILURE TO TIMELY PROSECUTE. HEARING SET FOR AUG-07-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-07-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-07-1995, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), FAILED TO OBTAIN A DEFAULT JUDGMENT AFTER PAPERS WERE SUBMITTED IN MAY; AND FOR WHY COURT SHOULD NOT DISMISS CASE OR TAKE OTHER APPROPRIATE ACTION., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-01-1995 CONTINUED FROM AUG-07-1995 TO SEP-11-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-11-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-11-1995, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 3RD OSC: FOR PLAINTIFF TO EXPLAIN TO THE COURT WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED FOR LACK OF PROSECUTION. ($50.00 SANCTIONS NOT POSTED AS OF 9/11/95) HEARING SET FOR OCT-11-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-11-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-11-1995, 4TH OSC AGAINST PLAINTIFF: SANCTIONS NOT POSTED AS REQUIRED, SANCTIONS WILL BE DETERMINED ON 11/13/95.
